sections.paragraph:
λογιϰός, ή, όν [λόγος]

—1. ‘consisting of narration’, story-filled, pert. to the message concerning Jesus Christ 1 Pt 2:2 (frequently interpreted here as ‘spiritual’, in the sense of ‘metaphorical’, but such interpretation, suggesting as it does the obvious, is less likely to have occurred to recipients of the gospel as story, cp. vs. 3).

—2. ‘characterized by careful thinking’, thoughtful Ro 12:1.
